sentences.target: On regarde un film avec un colonel.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd œ̃ film a.vɛk œ̃ kɔ.lɔ.nɛl/

translations.fr: On regarde un film avec un colonel.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd œ̃ film a.vɛk œ̃ kɔ.lɔ.nɛl/
translations.en: We’re watching a movie with a colonel.
translations.es: Estamos viendo una película con un coronel.
translations.de: Wir sehen einen Film mit einem Oberst.
translations.it: Stiamo guardando un film con un colonnello.
translations.ko: 우리는 대령이 나오는 영화를 보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在看一部有上校的电影。
translations.yue: 我哋喺睇一套有上校嘅電影。
translations.pt: Estamos assistindo a um filme com um coronel.
translations.tr: Bir albayın yer aldığı bir film izliyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem một bộ phim có một đại tá.
translations.ar: نحن نشاهد فيلماً يظهر فيه عقيد.
translations.nl: We kijken een film met een kolonel.
translations.hi: हम एक फिल्म देख रहे हैं जिसमें एक कर्नल है.
translations.el: Βλέπουμε μια ταινία με έναν συνταγματάρχη.
translations.nb: Vi ser en film med en oberst.
translations.id: Kami menonton film yang menampilkan seorang kolonel.
translations.sv: Vi tittar på en film med en överste.
translations.ro: Urmărim un film cu un colonel.
translations.cs: Díváme se na film s plukovníkem.
translations.da: Vi ser en film med en oberst.
translations.ja: 大佐が出てくる映画を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/generic subject pronoun (3rd person singular); subject of 'regarde'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; takes 'un film' as direct object and 'avec un colonel' as a prepositional complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'regarde'.
Preposition introducing a comitative phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'colonel'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Tu connais le colonel de la série.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔ.nɛ lə kɔ.lɔ.nɛl də la se.ʁi/

translations.fr: Tu connais le colonel de la série.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔ.nɛ lə kɔ.lɔ.nɛl də la se.ʁi/
translations.en: You know the colonel from the show.
translations.es: Conoces al coronel de la serie.
translations.de: Du kennst den Oberst aus der Serie.
translations.ko: 너는 그 시리즈의 대령을 알고 있어.
translations.yue: 你識嗰套劇入面嘅上校。
translations.pt: Você conhece o coronel da série.
translations.vi: Bạn biết vị đại tá trong bộ phim.
translations.nl: Jij kent de kolonel uit de serie.
translations.hi: तुम उस सीरीज के कर्नल को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις τον συνταγματάρχη από τη σειρά.
translations.id: Kamu mengenal kolonel dari serial itu.
translations.ro: Îl cunoști pe colonelul din serial.
translations.ja: 君はそのドラマの大佐を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'connais'.
Verb, 2nd person singular present indicative; selects 'le colonel' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'colonel'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'connais'.
Preposition 'of'; introduces the noun complement specifying 'colonel'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'série'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'de'.

sentences.target: Ils attendent le colonel devant la porte.
sentences.reading: /il za.tɑ̃d lə kɔ.lɔ.nɛl də.vɑ̃ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Ils attendent le colonel devant la porte.
translations.ipa: /il za.tɑ̃d lə kɔ.lɔ.nɛl də.vɑ̃ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: They are waiting for the colonel by the door.
translations.es: Están esperando al coronel junto a la puerta.
translations.de: Sie warten vor der Tür auf den Oberst.
translations.it: Stanno aspettando il colonnello vicino alla porta.
translations.ko: 그들은 문 앞에서 대령을 기다리고 있어요.
translations.pt: Eles estão esperando o coronel perto da porta.
translations.vi: Họ đang đợi vị đại tá ở cạnh cửa.
translations.nl: Ze wachten bij de deur op de kolonel.
translations.hi: वे दरवाज़े के पास कर्नल का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουν τον συνταγματάρχη δίπλα στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: De venter på obersten ved døren.
translations.id: Mereka menunggu kolonel di dekat pintu.
translations.sv: De väntar på översten vid dörren.
translations.ro: Ei îl așteaptă pe colonel lângă ușă.
translations.da: De venter på obersten ved døren.
translations.ja: 彼らはドアのそばで大佐を待っている。

tokens.explanation: Third-person plural subject pronoun (masculine or mixed); subject of 'attendent'.
Verb, 3rd person plural present indicative; takes 'le colonel' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'colonel'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'attendent'.
Preposition indicating location; governs 'la porte'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'devant' (locative complement).
